violationClasses.label: Helmet Non-Compliance
violationClasses.definition: Rider's head is NOT covered by a certified helmet. No helmet, or helmet not properly worn (straps loose, tilted). Only annotate for the primary rider on a 2-wheeler.
visualIndicators: Hair/scalp clearly visible without helmet coverage

violationClasses.label: Triple Riding
violationClasses.definition: 3 or more persons seated on a single 2-wheeler (motorcycle or scooter). Count silhouettes visible on the 2-wheeler.
edgeCases: Child (< 6 years) in front does NOT count

violationClasses.label: Red Light Violation
violationClasses.definition: Vehicle crosses the painted stop-line AFTER the traffic signal has turned RED. Requires signal state = RED AND vehicle position = beyond stop-line.
edgeCases: Vehicles already mid-intersection when light turned red

violationClasses.label: Seatbelt Non-Compliance
violationClasses.definition: Driver or front-seat passenger NOT wearing a visible seatbelt strap across their torso.
edgeCases: Rear-seat passengers: NOT enforced in this prototype
visualIndicators: No diagonal seatbelt strap visible across driver/front passenger

violationClasses.label: Mobile Phone Usage
violationClasses.definition: Driver is actively holding a mobile phone to their ear OR looking down at a device while the vehicle is in motion.
edgeCases: Stopped vehicles: NOT a moving traffic violation
visualIndicators: Hand raised to ear with device

violationClasses.label: Wrong-Side Driving
violationClasses.definition: Vehicle travelling against the correct flow of traffic on a divided road.
edgeCases: One-way roads: always wrong-side if going opposite direction
visualIndicators: Vehicle trajectory points into oncoming lane
Vehicle facing cameras from wrong direction

violationClasses.label: Stop Line Violation
violationClasses.definition: Vehicle stops beyond the painted stop-line at a signal or pedestrian crossing.
edgeCases: Large vehicles with long hoods: measure front bumper
Gradual creep: only if clearly beyond 1m past line
visualIndicators: Vehicle front wheel/bumper is beyond white painted line

violationClasses.label: Illegal Parking
violationClasses.definition: Vehicle parked in a no-parking zone (marked by yellow lines, signs, or bus stops) for > 5 minutes.

violationClasses.label: Overloaded Vehicle
violationClasses.definition: Truck, van, or auto-rickshaw carrying load that visually exceeds safe capacity (load sticking out > 30cm beyond vehicle boundary, or suspension visibly compressed).
edgeCases: Agricultural vehicles in designated zones: may be exempt
Contested load weight: flag for manual review

generalRules: All annotations must be made on original, unenhanced images
Minimum image resolution for annotation: 320x240 pixels
When uncertain (confidence < 0.65 of annotator), mark as 'REQUIRES_SECOND_REVIEW'
Never annotate the same image twice as the same violation
Record inter-annotator agreement score for each image
boundingBoxRules: Draw bounding box tightly around the violating object/person
For helmet: box around rider's head only
For triple riding: box around entire 2-wheeler
For red-light: box around vehicle + visible signal in frame
Include at least 5px padding around detected object
licencePlateRules: OCR accuracy target: 70%+ for clear conditions
Mark as UNREADABLE if plate is occluded > 50%
Mark as ANGLED if plate tilt > 30 degrees
Always store what was OCR-extracted, even if partial

interAnnotatorAgreement.disagreementResolutionProcess: Third reviewer (senior officer) casts deciding annotation
